evidence.description: REQ-TCU-001/002 happy-path add/remove: tagInventory.entries content asserted (PROP-TCU-008/009); PROP-TCU-013 source='curate-tag-chip' proved; Delta 6 3-arg outer curry matches behavioral-spec.md Revision 4
REQ-TCU-010 occurredOn threading invariant: now===SaveNoteRequested.occurredOn===NoteFileSaved.occurredOn===TagInventoryUpdated.occurredOn by construction (PROP-TCU-021)
PROP-TCU-002: idempotent add produces unchanged tags (200 runs, seed=42 and seed=99)
PROP-TCU-003: idempotent remove produces unchanged tags (200 runs, seed=42 and seed=7)
PROP-TCU-004: REQ-TCU-003/004 no-op short-circuit — spy counters all 0 on idempotent paths (5+4 tests)
PROP-TCU-007: SaveError + SaveValidationError.cause exhaustiveness — 13 tests, genuine @ts-expect-error non-vacuous; per-cause tests for note-not-in-feed, hydration-failed, frontmatter-invariant
PROP-TCU-012: dead-variant @ts-expect-error directives for tag and duplicate-tag variants are non-vacuous; LiveAddTagError narrow type anchors the proof

PROP-TCU-006: save-failure path does not call updateProjectionsAfterSave, FeedOps.refreshSort, or publishInternal; PROP-TCU-018: FsError variant → NoteSaveFailureReason mapping correct for all 5 variants
PROP-TCU-005: previousFrontmatter sourced from loaded Note.frontmatter (200 runs); Tier-0 type assertion non-null; update-projections.ts:106-110 throws on null previousFrontmatter (runtime guard)
PROP-TCU-020: 'getEditorBuffer' extends keyof TagChipUpdateDeps is never; 'editingState' extends keyof TagChipUpdateDeps is never — structural non-coupling guarantee
PROP-TCU-017: TagChipAddedOnFeed/TagChipRemovedOnFeed are CurateInternalEvent; not PublicDomainEvent; TagInventoryUpdated is CurateInternalEvent; NoteFileSaved/NoteSaveFailed are PublicDomainEvent
127 pass, 0 fail (bun test, 2.05s); 40 verification harness tests pass; 21/21 PROP-TCU proved; 7/7 required (PROP-TCU-001..007) proved
PROP-TCU-015: clock budget spy harness — 8 path scenarios; idempotent/not-found/hydration-fail all 0 calls; write paths all exactly 1 call
PROP-TCU-001: applyTagOperationPure referential transparency (200+100 runs, seed=42 and seed=7) — required obligation
